metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace that ships the foundational, domain-agnostic ESOS Generic Plugin Constitution. Wraps the repository so it can be installed via `/plugin marketplace add` + `/plugin install`.

plugins.name: esos-generic-plugin-constitution
plugins.description: Foundational ESOS constitution as a Claude Code plugin. Provides the five specialist subagents (analyst, security, compliance, coding, testing), three common skills, five per-role review skills, and the create/validate workflow skills.
